description: Machine-readable registry of QRUNE opcodes for use in VMs, assemblers, explorers, fuzzers and AI agent tooling. Part of NovaNet / QNET ecosystem.

opcodes.name: OP_RUNE_ETCH
opcodes.description: Etch new rune: metadata, premine, max_supply, decimals, symbol -> rune_id. Creates global unique rune with Wizard Q narrative metadata.
opcodes.stack_effect: metadata premine max_supply decimals symbol -> rune_id

opcodes.name: OP_RUNE_MINT
opcodes.description: Mint amount of rune_id (respects supply rules and authorization)

opcodes.name: OP_RUNE_TRANSFER
opcodes.description: Transfer rune balance to outputs. Supports conditional logic via composition with control flow.

opcodes.name: OP_RUNE_BURN
opcodes.description: Permanently burn rune units (deflationary or ritual mechanics)

opcodes.name: OP_RUNE_BALANCE
opcodes.description: Push current rune balance for context owner

opcodes.name: OP_RUNE_METADATA_SET
opcodes.description: Update or append Wizard Q narrative metadata / attributes to rune (authorized only)

opcodes.name: OP_RUNE_METADATA_GET
opcodes.description: Retrieve and push metadata for rune_id

opcodes.name: OP_MESH_ID_VERIFY
opcodes.description: Verify top item matches current tx mesh identity / NovaNet pubkey

opcodes.name: OP_AI_SWARM_CALLBACK
opcodes.description: (Planned) Invoke AI agent swarm for decision/lore generation. Requires swarm consensus or ZK result.

categories.metadata: Wizard Q narrative and attribute handling
categories.extension: Future AI, ZK and custom extensions

notes: This registry is the authoritative source. New opcodes must be added here with unique codes in the appropriate range before implementation. Gas costs are initial estimates and subject to calibration against real mesh node benchmarks.
